name: Cuba Libre
title: Cuba Libre Cocktail | Cuba Libre Recipe | How to make a Cuba Libre | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A classic highball that combines BACARDÍ Carta Oro rum, cola, and lime juice over ice.
marketing_description: The Cuba Libre perfectly captures the independent spirit of BACARDÍ. Finish with a lime wedge and drink a toast to freedom.

steps: Fill a highball glass with cubed ice, and squeeze in the lime wedges.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Oro Rum followed by chilled cola.
Give it all a gentle stir.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Cuba Libre 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Oro rum 100 ml cola 2 lime wedges lime wedge as garnish ... Fill a highball glass with cubed ice, and squeeze in the lime wedges. Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Oro Rum followed by chilled cola. Give it all a gentle stir. Garnish with a lime wedge.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make an authentic Cuba Libre Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
